voxya.description: Shadow, death, void — the Shattered Archipelago

orilyth.description: Energy, crystal, data — the Veil of Whispers

korvess.description: Mutation, flora, evolution — the Verdant Abyss

sanguis.description: Magma, spirit, defense — the Crimson Veil

silith9.description: Machine, cybernetic, cold precision — the False Moon

creatures.name: Voidmire Stalker
creatures.flavor: It does not chase. It simply appears where you are weakest.

creatures.name: Throne Wraith
creatures.flavor: A silent crown for a kingdom of ash.

creatures.name: Gloomforge Thrall
creatures.flavor: Forged in silence. Built to endure.

creatures.name: Dusk Gate Lurker
creatures.flavor: It waits where the light forgets to go.

creatures.name: Skyrift Harvester
creatures.effect: When this destroys an enemy creature, steal 4 Essence.

creatures.name: Weeping Stone Revenant
creatures.effect: Once per game, when destroyed, return to your hand instead.

creatures.name: Stormspire Shade
creatures.effect: Gains +500 ATK while attacking along a purple ley-line.

creatures.name: Merchant's Grave Specter
creatures.effect: On summon, discard 1 card to draw 2 new ones.

creatures.name: Shadow Throne Tyrant
creatures.effect: Whenever it destroys a creature, gain 5 Essence. King's Aura: All your Level 1 creatures gain +300 ATK.

creatures.name: Archipelago Leviathan
creatures.effect: Can move through one occupied hex. Once per game: Teleport to any hex adjacent to a friendly base.

creatures.name: Eternal Dusk Sovereign
creatures.effect: At the start of every minute, deal 800 damage to the nearest enemy King's Throne.

creatures.name: Spark Drone
creatures.flavor: A humming shard of bottled lightning, eager to discharge.

creatures.name: Crystal Sentry
creatures.flavor: Faceted eyes see every whisper carried on the storm.

creatures.name: Stormcaller Adept
creatures.flavor: The youngest adepts can redirect a storm with a whisper.

creatures.name: Data Wraith
creatures.flavor: It lives inside the message, feeding on its meaning.

creatures.name: Lightning Weaver
creatures.effect: Deals 400 splash damage to all enemy creatures at the same base on arrival.
creatures.flavor: Her loom is the sky; her thread is lightning.

creatures.name: Crystal Spire Warden
creatures.effect: This creature cannot be moved by enemy effects.
creatures.flavor: The spire has stood for a thousand years. It will stand for a thousand more.

creatures.name: Cipher Knight
creatures.effect: Gains +400 ATK when attacking a Silith-9 creature.
creatures.flavor: Every blow is a decryption key against the False Moon.

creatures.name: Storm Leviathan
creatures.effect: On summon: deal 600 damage to all enemy creatures within 1 hop.
creatures.flavor: The oldest storm in the Veil, given form and purpose.

creatures.name: Data Sovereign
creatures.effect: Reveal one random enemy creature's stats at the start of each minute.
creatures.flavor: Knowledge is the only currency that cannot be stolen.

creatures.name: Thornling Swarm
creatures.flavor: A thousand tiny mouths, all screaming for flesh.

creatures.name: Rotbark Sentinel
creatures.flavor: It has stood watch since before the Fracture. It remembers.

creatures.name: Vinespeaker
creatures.flavor: She sings to the roots, and the roots obey.

creatures.name: Chitin Brute
creatures.flavor: Each generation sheds a stronger shell.

creatures.name: Spore Horror
creatures.effect: When destroyed, deal 500 damage to the creature that destroyed it.
creatures.flavor: Its death is just another stage in its life cycle.

creatures.name: Carnivorous Cradle
creatures.effect: Enemy creatures that move into this base take 300 damage.
creatures.flavor: It blooms only when prey steps inside.

creatures.name: Alpha Predator
creatures.effect: Gains +300 ATK for each enemy creature at the same base.
creatures.flavor: The jungle crowned it. The jungle is never wrong.

creatures.name: Verdant Titan
creatures.effect: Heals 400 HP to your King's Throne at the start of each minute.
creatures.flavor: The forest itself rose to defend its children.

creatures.name: Hive Mind Sovereign
creatures.effect: All your creatures at the same base share their highest ATK value.
creatures.flavor: What one knows, all know. What one strikes, all kill.

creatures.name: Cinder Hound
creatures.flavor: Its footsteps leave smoldering prints in solid rock.

creatures.name: Magma Guardian
creatures.flavor: Cooled on the outside, burning eternal within.

creatures.name: Ember Seer
creatures.flavor: She reads the future in the dance of dying embers.

creatures.name: Ash Phalanx
creatures.flavor: A thousand warriors, compressed into a single burning form.

creatures.name: Flame Lancer
creatures.effect: Pierces through: ignores 400 DEF when attacking.
creatures.flavor: Her lance was forged in the heart of a dying star.

creatures.name: Crimson Bastion
creatures.effect: All friendly creatures at this base gain +300 DEF.
creatures.flavor: The walls bleed, but they never break.

creatures.name: Pyroclastic Wyrm
creatures.effect: Can move through enemy-occupied bases without engaging.
creatures.flavor: It swims through stone as if it were water.

creatures.name: Magma Sovereign
creatures.effect: At the start of each minute, deal 400 damage to all enemy creatures at adjacent bases.
creatures.flavor: The mountain speaks. All of Sanguis listens.

creatures.name: Phoenix Ascendant
creatures.effect: Once per game, when destroyed: revive at your King's Throne with full stats.
creatures.flavor: Death is merely the fire that makes her brighter.

creatures.name: Chrome Drone
creatures.flavor: It has no fear subroutine.

creatures.name: Grid Sentry
creatures.flavor: It scans. It waits. It never blinks.

creatures.name: Neural Scout
creatures.flavor: Its eyes are the Nine's eyes. You are already observed.

creatures.name: Bioforge Abomination
creatures.flavor: A hundred donor genomes, one perfect killing machine.

creatures.name: Plasma Reaver
creatures.effect: Deals +500 damage to creatures with DEF above 1500.
creatures.flavor: Armor is irrelevant. Plasma does not discriminate.

creatures.name: Phase Wraith
creatures.effect: Can move through one occupied base per turn without engaging.
creatures.flavor: It exists in two hexes until observed.

creatures.name: Chrome Colossus
creatures.effect: Deals double ATK when attacking a King's Throne.
creatures.flavor: The Nine built it to crack worlds.

creatures.name: Nexus Reaper
creatures.effect: When this destroys a creature, summon a Chrome Drone at the same base.
creatures.flavor: Every kill feeds the Nexus. Every death builds the army.

creatures.name: Prime Directive
creatures.effect: All enemy creatures lose 200 ATK while this is on the field.
creatures.flavor: The Nine speak as one. Their voice ends worlds.
